docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, PAULO CEZAR
